Interface PaletteDao

public interface PaletteDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Palette entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing color palettes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<Integer>
    countByUser(long userId)
    Gets the count of palettes for a specific user.
    int
    delete(Palette palette)
    Deletes a palette from the database.
    int
    delete(Palette... palettes)
    Deletes multiple palettes from the database.
    long
    insert(Palette palette)
    Inserts a single palette into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Palette... palettes)
    Inserts multiple palettes into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Collection<Palette> palettes)
    Inserts multiple palettes into the database.
    LiveData<Palette>
    select(long paletteId)
    Retrieves a palette by its ID.
    LiveData<Palette>
    selectByName(long userId, String paletteName)
    Retrieves a palette by name for a specific user.
    LiveData<List<Palette>>
    selectByUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all palettes for a specific user, ordered by last used (most recent first).
    LiveData<List<Palette>>
    selectByUserOrderedByName(long userId)
    Retrieves all palettes for a specific user, ordered by palette name.
    LiveData<List<Palette>>
    selectCustomByUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all custom (user-created) palettes for a specific user.
    LiveData<List<Palette>>
    selectDefaultPalettes()
    Retrieves all default (system-provided) palettes.
    int
    update(Palette palette)
    Updates an existing palette in the database.
    int
    update(Palette... palettes)
    Updates multiple existing palettes in the database.
    int
    updateLastUsed(long paletteId)
    Updates the last used timestamp for a palette.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(Palette palette)
      Inserts a single palette into the database.
      Parameters:
      palette - Palette instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted palette.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<Palette> palettes)
      Inserts multiple palettes into the database.
      Parameters:
      palettes - Collection of palettes to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted palettes.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Palette... palettes)
      Inserts multiple palettes into the database.
      Parameters:
      palettes - Variable number of palettes to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted palettes.

    • update

      int update(Palette palette)
      Updates an existing palette in the database.
      Parameters:
      palette - Palette instance with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • update

      int update(Palette... palettes)
      Updates multiple existing palettes in the database.
      Parameters:
      palettes - Variable number of palettes with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • delete

      int delete(Palette palette)
      Deletes a palette from the database. Note: Cascades to related palette colors.
      Parameters:
      palette - Palette instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(Palette... palettes)
      Deletes multiple palettes from the database.
      Parameters:
      palettes - Variable number of palettes to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<Palette> select(long paletteId)
      Retrieves a palette by its ID.
      Parameters:
      paletteId - Palette ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the palette, or null if not found.

    • selectByUser

      LiveData<List<Palette>> selectByUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all palettes for a specific user, ordered by last used (most recent first).
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of palettes for the specified user.

    • selectByUserOrderedByName

      LiveData<List<Palette>> selectByUserOrderedByName(long userId)
      Retrieves all palettes for a specific user, ordered by palette name.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of palettes for the specified user.

    • selectDefaultPalettes

      LiveData<List<Palette>> selectDefaultPalettes()
      Retrieves all default (system-provided) palettes.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of default palettes.

    • selectCustomByUser

      LiveData<List<Palette>> selectCustomByUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all custom (user-created) palettes for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of custom palettes for the specified user.

    • selectByName

      LiveData<Palette> selectByName(long userId, String paletteName)
      Retrieves a palette by name for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      paletteName - Palette name to search for.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the palette, or null if not found.

    • updateLastUsed

      int updateLastUsed(long paletteId)
      Updates the last used timestamp for a palette.
      Parameters:
      paletteId - Palette ID.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • countByUser

      LiveData<Integer> countByUser(long userId)
      Gets the count of palettes for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the number of palettes for the user.
